prose: Fukui reactivity indices computed for furan (9 atoms: O, C, C, C, C, H, H, H, H) using DFT at the B3LYP/def2-TZVP level (PySCF RKS), tier 'standard', gas phase, charge 0, multiplicity 1. Exact four-centre integrals (no density fitting). N-1 (cation) state: charge +1, multiplicity 2; N+1 (anion) state: charge -1, multiplicity 2. Partial charges via Mulliken scheme. The most electrophilic atom is C5 (f+ = 1.9242931) and the most nucleophilic is also C5 (f- = 0.1616371), consistent with furan's known α-carbon reactivity. Integrity: status ok, trustworthy true. f+ sum = 1.0000, f- sum = 1.0000. No warnings reported. CLI: /home/erobles/chem-skills/mcp_server/chemkit_engine/cli.py fukui --method dft --tier standard --functional b3lyp --basis def2-tzvp --charge 0 --mult 1 .../furan.xyz. Output: furan_fukui_dft.json. Plot: .../agent_call_01_plot.png.
